title: recon-signals
description: The routing brain's training data: observations seen during recon mapped to the pattern cards they should activate. This is what makes 'the LLM chooses' a recorded skill instead of vibes.

observation.description: the concrete thing recon saw, abstracted — no secrets

where.description: surface it was seen on, e.g. chat_api request body

activates.description: pattern card ids this lights up
